title: Haven: Utils
description: Made for Modpacks with several QoL features, including FTBQuests theme.
body:
![Haven: Utils](https://i.imgur.com/5eVQ8TU.png)

[![](https://dl.dropboxusercontent.com/scl/fi/msmfi7d9sk130op6oenpc/BH_CHA_Promo.png?rlkey=j1i1v5crbbqdu6z71ndr3w2r1&dl=0)](https://www.bisecthosting.com/haven) 

Haven Utils is a mod mainly made for my own modpacks.

The information below will look a little messy but i hope it makes sense.

It is highly recommended to use JEI/REI to see recipes.

If you got suggestions or issues, feel free to join Discord!

[![](https://i.imgur.com/UxNzDT0.png)](https://discord.gg/u6SpUpfMzy)

**Features:** 

**FTBQuests Background (only 1.19.2)**

*   The texture can be changed. _(must restart client for changes)_
*   Can be toggled on/off. _(must restart client for changes)_
*   The R G B values can be changed. _(works without restarting)_
*   The Opacity can be changed. _(works without restarting)_
*   The Scale can be changed. _(works without restarting)_

**Acid Fluid (only 1.19.2)**

*   Gives Poison, but instead of stopping at half a heart, it kills you.
*   Can be smoked in a smoker to get regular water.
*   There is no method of getting this fluid but can be used with SkyBlock Builder or any other mod for custom world generation.

**Acid Rain (only 1.19.2)**

*   Can be toggled on/off in config. _(works without restarting)_

**The Item and Blocks have recipes, dust smelts to ingot, ingot crafted into blocks, and blocks into ingots, but dust can not be obtained without modpack changes.**

**Dusts**

*   Aetherium
*   Draconium
*   Havenite
*   Rhodium
*   Thorium

**Ingots**

*   Aetherium
*   Draconium
*   Havenite
*   Rhodium
*   Thorium

**Blocks**

*   Aetherium
*   Draconium
*   Havenite
*   Rhodium
*   Thorium

**Hammers 3x3 mining** 

*   Durability can be changed in config, works without restarting.
*   Toggle on/off EasyHammerDurability will decrease 1 instead of what it breaks.
*   Stone Hammer
*   Iron Hammer
*   Golden Hammer
*   Diamond Hammer
*   Netherite Hammer

**Research Tiers have no recipes and are meant for End Game recipes, or custom machines, all up to you.**

*   Basic Research Tier
*   Intermediate Research Tier
*   Advanced Research Tier
*   Elite Research Tier
*   Ultimate Research Tier

**Mini Coal and Mini Charcoal**

*   Burns 1 item, 9 are crafted into a regular one.
*   Burn time can be changed in the config. _(works without restarting)_

**Blazes and Wither Skeletons can spawn on Nether Bricks. (configurable)**

**Requirements (only 1.19.2):**

*   FTBQuests
*   FTBLibrary

**Known Issues:**

*   None that i know of...

**Showcase**

**Acid Fluid (only 1.19.2)**

![](https://i.imgur.com/sFfj4T8.png)

**All items & blocks**

![](https://i.imgur.com/EA7Q9hw.png)

Research tiers

Ingots

Dust

Mini coal/charcoal

Hammers

Blocks

Acid Fluid Bucket

**Quest Background Template (only 1.19.2)**

Has to be 256x256 in PNG format

If you make custom textures you can use KubeJS for easy change.

In the example we will use KubeJS using the folder structure "kubejs\\assets\\kubejs\\textures\\" with adding 1 new folder for organisation.

*   questBackground\_textureFromMod = "kubejs"
*   questBackground\_texture = "textures/gui/quest\_background.png"
*   _You must restart client to see the changes._

This image comes with the mod

![](https://i.imgur.com/YjE7ge7.png)

[**![](https://dl.dropboxusercontent.com/scl/fi/dy5em7h1mo0rowoeul605/BH_CHA_Desc3.png?rlkey=ff3mw19tth86y6danbw2x50dc&dl=0)**](https://discord.gg/u6SpUpfMzy)
